controls.name: GitHub Actions uses OIDC
controls.evidence: Workflows use federated identity instead of static cloud credentials.

controls.name: Workloads use Workload Identity
controls.evidence: Service accounts map to managed identities through OIDC federation.

controls.name: Secrets referenced from Key Vault
controls.evidence: Applications use Key Vault references and SDK helper patterns.

controls.name: Schema migration is separated from infrastructure provisioning
controls.evidence: Release pipeline owns schema migration after infrastructure and access sync.

controls.name: No static cloud credentials in CI/CD
controls.evidence: Demo workflows are designed around OIDC and managed identity.
